category_sources: Official Raptor site describes it as a C library for parsing and serializing RDF triples.
source_facts.description says raptor is an RDF parser toolkit.
display_name_sources: Official Raptor site title is Raptor RDF Syntax Library.
docs_sources: Official Raptor page includes overview, installation, license, and source links.
Official Raptor site links to 2.0 API Documentation.
repo_sources: Official Raptor Sources section says development GIT sources can be browsed at GitHub or checked out from github.com/dajobe/raptor.
Official Raptor site links to Git sources on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official Raptor site describes RDF parsers and serializers for RDF/XML, N-Triples, Turtle, RDFa, RSS, Atom, and related syntaxes.
source_facts.description identifies an RDF parser toolkit.
